positive: A cute, stylized mascot illustration of a sleepy fox wearing a tiny knitted scarf, nestled in a pile of autumn leaves. The style should be flat design, highly adorable, simple linework, perfect for screen printing. Pastel color palette, wholesome, vector art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, shadows, complex background, realism
